messages.content: 翻译 通过统一平台 Web 网关，并围绕 API 提供相关的 Mock、调试、代码生成和管理能力，实现研发提效；通过搭建研发平台，收敛和构建研发提效工具，探索 aPaaS 低代码搭建能力，实现交付效率的提升。

By utilizing a unified platform web gateway and providing related mock, debugging, code generation, and management capabilities around APIs, development efficiency can be improved; by building a development platform, converging and constructing development efficiency tools, exploring aPaaS low-code construction capabilities, delivery efficiency can be improved.
翻译 核心指标
Core metrics/KPI (Key Performance Indicators)
BFF 接口迁移占比
BFF interface migration ratio/percentage
IDL 生成 API 调用占比
IDL generated API invocation ratio/percentage
BOE 环境数据可用性
BOE environment data availability
Mock Data 可用性
Mock data availability/availability of mock data
将现有的 BFF 接口迁移至网关上维护，计算口径：已迁移接口/总 BFF 接口。
Migrated BFF interfaces onto the gateway for maintenance. Calculation formula: Number of migrated interfaces/Total number of BFF interfaces.
能基于服务端的 IDL 定义直接生成前端的 service.ts 的 API 调用代码：计算口径：已覆盖 API / 总 API 数。
Able to directly generate API invocation code for the frontend service.ts based on the server-side IDL definitions. Calculation formula: Number of covered APIs/Total number of APIs.
全平台
Full platform
通过 API Mock + 数据 Mock 实现 BOE 环境下的接口数据可用，让 BOE 环境下的调试高效、顺畅。计算口径：BOE 环境 Mock 页面数 / 总 BOE 环境不可用页面数。

Through API mock + data mock to achieve the availability of interface data in BOE environment, making debugging in BOE environment efficient and smooth. Calculation formula: Number of BOE environment mock pages/Total number of BOE environment unavailable pages.
前端开发过程中为开发者提供 mock data 能力，可根据 rpc idl 一键生成 mock data。计算口径：配置过 mock 的 API 数量 / 总 API 数量

Providing mock data capabilities for developers during the frontend development process, and one-click generation of mock data based on rpc idl. Calculation formula: Number of APIs configured with mock data/Total number of APIs.
